parents.subject: LU-16540 clio: Remove env from cl_sync_io_wait

commit.subject: LU-16540 clio: Make owner_set match owner_clear
commit.message:
LU-16540 clio: Make owner_set match owner_clear

owner_set should handle setting the owner, as owner_clear
handles clearing it.

test-parameters: trivial

Signed-off-by: Patrick Farrell <pfarrell@whamcloud.com>
Change-Id: I52851973dc8ec93ced569b90b193e459d67813dd
